script_changes.header_comment_before: CHG-0963 / TKT-1024: default kept at gemma4:31b-cloud intentionally...NEEDS_KEN: confirm whether to retest on 26b before any swap.

MODEL and RESULT_FILE env vars still work for ad-hoc comparisons.
